input: Find the maximum true power for the Y-phase of the AC meter at Localizer.
query: SELECT MAX(true_power_y_max) FROM ac_local;

input: Find the total energy consumed across the entire network (all Main meters) for the current year.
query: SELECT SUM(total_consumption) FROM (SELECT consumption AS total_consumption FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = EXTRACT(year from CURRENT_DATE) UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = EXTRACT(year from CURRENT_DATE) UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = EXTRACT(year from CURRENT_DATE) UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM main_glide WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = EXTRACT(year from CURRENT_DATE)) AS network_total;

input: Calculate the total energy used by the Main meter at CNS on holidays (Sundays).
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0;

input: Compare the daily average voltage of R-phase at CNS vs DVOR.
query: SELECT c.time::date, AVG(c.voltage_r_avg) as cns_v, AVG(d.voltage_r_avg) as dvor_v FROM main_cns c JOIN main_dvor d ON c.time = d.time GROUP BY c.time::date;

input: Calculate the average Y-phase current for the AC meter at DVOR specifically on Sundays.
query: SELECT AVG(current_y_avg) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0;

input: Is the Y-phase voltage stable (within 220V-240V) at DVOR currently?
query: SELECT time, voltage_y_avg FROM main_dvor WHERE voltage_y_avg >= 220 AND voltage_y_avg <= 240 ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 5;

input: What is the maximum current recorded on the Y-phase for UPS2 at DVOR?
query: SELECT MAX(current_y_max) FROM ups2_dvor;

input: How many records at CNS show a Y-phase voltage above 255V?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM main_cns WHERE voltage_y_max > 255;

input: List the total consumption for the Main meter at CNS during the month of May 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 5 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: What is the total energy used by all UPS meters at Localizer in March?
query: SELECT SUM(u1.consumption + u2.consumption) FROM ups1_local u1 JOIN ups2_local u2 ON u1.time = u2.time WHERE EXTRACT(month from u1.time) = 3;

input: What is the standard deviation of the true power total for the entire network during the last month?
query: SELECT STDDEV(val) FROM (SELECT true_power_total_avg as val FROM main_cns WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' UNION ALL SELECT true_power_total_avg FROM main_dvor WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' UNION ALL SELECT true_power_total_avg FROM main_local WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' UNION ALL SELECT true_power_total_avg FROM main_glide WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month') AS network_std;

input: Calculate the total consumption of the AC meter at Glide Path for all Sundays in 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ac_glide WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: What was the highest temperature at Glide Path on January 15, 2024?
query: SELECT MAX(max) FROM temp_glide WHERE time::date = '2024-01-15';

input: Identify the days in August where the total apparent power exceeded 500 kVA at CNS.
query: SELECT DISTINCT time::date FROM main_cns WHERE apparent_power_total_max > 500 AND EXTRACT(month from time) = 8;

input: Find any records where the Main meter recorded consumption but all its sub-meters (AC, UPS1, UPS2) recorded zero at the CNS location.
query: SELECT m.time FROM main_cns m JOIN ac_cns a ON m.time = a.time JOIN ups1_cns u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_cns u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE m.consumption > 0 AND a.consumption = 0 AND u1.consumption = 0 AND u2.consumption = 0;

input: What was the total energy consumed by all AC meters combined across all locations during the Summer season?
query: SELECT SUM(total_c) FROM (SELECT consumption as total_c FROM ac_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (2,3,4,5) UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (2,3,4,5) UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ac_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (2,3,4,5) UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ac_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (2,3,4,5)) as all_acs;

input: What is the average frequency of the Main meter at DVOR during the Summer season?
query: SELECT AVG(freq_avg) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (2, 3, 4, 5);

input: What is the average power factor for the R-phase at DVOR on Fridays?
query: SELECT AVG(pf_r_avg) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(DOW FROM time) = 5;

input: Find the maximum current recorded on the B-phase for UPS1 at Localizer in November.
query: SELECT MAX(current_b_max) FROM ups1_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 11;

input: What is the average total current for the Main meter at Glide Path across the entire Winter season?
query: SELECT AVG(current_total_avg) FROM main_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1);

input: Find the average frequency for the Main meter at Localizer between 10 AM and 4 PM.
query: SELECT AVG(freq_avg) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 10 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) <= 16;

input: What is the total kWh consumed by sub-meters at DVOR on days when the Main meter reported zero consumption?
query: SELECT SUM(a.consumption + u1.consumption + u2.consumption) FROM ac_dvor a JOIN ups1_dvor u1 ON a.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_dvor u2 ON a.time = u2.time JOIN main_dvor m ON a.time = m.time WHERE m.consumption = 0;

input: Find all instances where the total harmonic distortion or voltage fluctuations exceeded 10% at the Glide Path.
query: SELECT time FROM main_glide WHERE ((voltage_avg_max - voltage_avg_min) / 230 * 100) > 10;

input: Show the consumption trend of UPS2 at Localizer for the last 7 days.
query: SELECT time::date, SUM(consumption) FROM ups2_local WHERE time > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY time::date ORDER BY time::date;

input: What is the average voltage RY for UPS1 at Glide Path on weekdays?
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_ry_avg) FROM ups1_glide WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) >= 1 AND EXTRACT(DOW from time) <= 5;

input: Identify the days in the monsoon season where the R-phase current at CNS was consistently above 10A for more than 5 hours.
query: SELECT time::date FROM main_cns WHERE current_r_avg > 10 AND EXTRACT(month from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 9 GROUP BY time::date HAVING COUNT(*) > 5;

input: Identify the lowest average RB line voltage for the Main meter at DVOR in August.
query: SELECT MIN(voltage_rb_avg) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 8;

input: Identify any 15-minute periods where the Apparent Power was significantly higher (1.5x) than the True Power at CNS.
query: SELECT time FROM main_cns WHERE apparent_power_total_avg > (true_power_total_avg * 1.5);

input: Calculate the total kWh saved at the DVOR location assuming consumption would have been 10% higher if not for optimization.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption * 1.1) - SUM(consumption) as energy_saved FROM main_dvor;

input: What is the minimum voltage recorded on the Y-phase for UPS1 at DVOR in July?
query: SELECT MIN(voltage_y_min) FROM ups1_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 7;

input: Identify the dates in June where the frequency was less than 49.8 Hz at Glide Path.
query: SELECT DISTINCT time::date FROM main_glide WHERE freq_min < 49.8 AND EXTRACT(month from time) = 6;

input: What was the highest temperature at Glide Path on January 15, 2024?
query: SELECT MAX(max) FROM temp_glide WHERE time::date = '2024-01-15';

input: What is the correlation between the Main meter's true power and the AC meter's true power at the DVOR location?
query: SELECT CORR(m.true_power_total_avg, a.true_power_total_avg) FROM main_dvor m JOIN ac_dvor a ON m.time = a.time;

input: What was the average temperature across all locations on Sundays in 2023?
query: WITH temp_data AS (SELECT time, avg FROM temp_cns UNION ALL SELECT time, avg FROM temp_dvor UNION ALL SELECT time, avg FROM temp_local UNION ALL SELECT time, avg FROM temp_glide) SELECT AVG(avg) AS avg_temp FROM temp_data WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: List the months in 2025 where the AC meter at DVOR consumed more energy than UPS1 and UPS2 combined.
query: SELECT EXTRACT(month from time) as month FROM ac_dvor a JOIN ups1_dvor u1 ON a.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_dvor u2 ON a.time = u2.time WHERE EXTRACT(year from a.time) = 2025 AND a.consumption > (u1.consumption + u2.consumption) GROUP BY month;

input: What is the average line voltage RY for the AC meter at DVOR on weekends?
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_ry_avg) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) IN (0, 6);

input: Calculate the average power factor for all UPS1 units when the temperature at their respective location was above 35°C.
query: SELECT AVG(u.pf_avg_avg) FROM ups1_cns u JOIN temp_cns t ON u.time = t.time WHERE t.max > 35 UNION ALL SELECT AVG(u.pf_avg_avg) FROM ups1_dvor u JOIN temp_dvor t ON u.time = t.time WHERE t.max > 35;

input: Compare the total weekend consumption of AC meters across all sites.
query: SELECT 'CNS' as loc, SUM(consumption) FROM ac_cns WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) IN (0,6) UNION ALL SELECT 'DVOR', SUM(consumption) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) IN (0,6) UNION ALL SELECT 'Localizer', SUM(consumption) FROM ac_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) IN (0,6);

input: What is the minimum average power factor recorded across all three phases for the AC meter at DVOR during the Summer season?
query: SELECT MIN(LEAST(pf_r_avg, pf_y_avg, pf_b_avg)) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) >= 2 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 5;

input: What is the total kWh consumption for the Main meter at DVOR on Fridays in the Winter season?
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 5 AND EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1);

input: Show the average temperature at CNS on days when consumption was less than 5 kWh.
query: SELECT AVG(t.avg) FROM temp_cns t JOIN main_cns m ON t.time = m.time WHERE m.consumption < 5;

input: Find the maximum current drawn by the AC meter at Localizer during peak summer months (April and May).
query: SELECT MAX(current_total_max) FROM ac_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (4, 5);

input: Calculate the total apparent power of all sub-meters at DVOR for February.
query: SELECT SUM(a.apparent_power_total_avg + u1.apparent_power_total_avg + u2.apparent_power_total_avg) FROM ac_dvor a JOIN ups1_dvor u1 ON a.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_dvor u2 ON a.time = u2.time WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.time) = 2;

input: What is the average true power for UPS2 at Glide Path on Friday nights?
query: SELECT AVG(true_power_total_avg) FROM ups2_glide WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 5 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 20;

input: What is the total consumption for the UPS2 meter at DVOR on the first day of every month?
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ups2_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(day from time) = 1;

input: Identify if the voltage ever crossed 260V at any meter in DVOR.
query: SELECT * FROM main_dvor WHERE voltage_r_max > 260 OR voltage_y_max > 260 OR voltage_b_max > 260 LIMIT 10;

input: Calculate the total kWh for the AC meter at Localizer on every Sunday in 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ac_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Show me the minimum voltage between R and Y phases for the AC meter at DVOR in September 2022.
query: SELECT MIN(voltage_ry_min) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 9 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2022;

input: List the dates in September 2023 when the frequency at CNS dropped below 49.7 Hz.
query: SELECT DISTINCT time::date FROM main_cns WHERE freq_min < 49.7 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM time) = 9 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM time) = 2023;

input: Determine if the total consumption of UPS1 and UPS2 at DVOR ever exceeded the consumption of the Main meter on any given day.
query: SELECT u1.time::date FROM ups1_dvor u1 JOIN ups2_dvor u2 ON u1.time = u2.time JOIN main_dvor m ON u1.time = m.time WHERE (u1.consumption + u2.consumption) > m.consumption;

input: List the top 10 hours with the highest total true power at the Localizer.
query: SELECT time, true_power_total_max FROM main_local ORDER BY true_power_total_max DESC LIMIT 10;

input: Which location has the highest average frequency stability (minimum difference between Max and Min frequency)?
query: SELECT location_name, AVG(diff) as stability FROM (SELECT 'CNS' as location_name, (freq_max - freq_min) as diff FROM main_cns UNION ALL SELECT 'DVOR', (freq_max - freq_min) FROM main_dvor UNION ALL SELECT 'Localizer', (freq_max - freq_min) FROM main_local) AS stability_data GROUP BY location_name ORDER BY stability ASC LIMIT 1;

input: Find the average frequency at DVOR when both the AC meter and Main meter showed consumption above 5 kWh.
query: SELECT AVG(m.freq_avg) FROM main_dvor m JOIN ac_dvor a ON m.time = a.time WHERE m.consumption > 5 AND a.consumption > 5;

input: Find the peak apparent power for the B-phase of the Main meter at CNS.
query: SELECT MAX(apparent_power_b_max) FROM main_cns;

input: Identify if there were any 'Zero Load' events (True Power < 0.1) on the Main meter at CNS when the temperature was above 40°C.
query: SELECT m.time FROM main_cns m JOIN temp_cns t ON m.time = t.time WHERE m.true_power_total_avg < 0.1 AND t.max > 40;

input: What is the average power factor for the Y-phase at Localizer on weekends?
query: SELECT AVG(pf_y_avg) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW FROM time) IN (0, 6);

input: Calculate the total consumption of the UPS1 meter at Glide Path for the first quarter (January to March) of 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ups1_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (1, 2, 3) AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Calculate the percentage of time the voltage remained stable (within limits) during the Monsoon season at Glide Path.
query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN (voltage_avg_max - voltage_avg_min) / NULLIF(((voltage_avg_max + voltage_avg_min) / 2), 0) * 100 <= 6 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS stable_percentage FROM main_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 9;

input: Show me all records where the total apparent power was zero or null for the AC meter at Glide Path.
query: SELECT * FROM ac_glide WHERE apparent_power_total_avg = 0 OR apparent_power_total_avg IS NULL LIMIT 50;

input: Show me the total energy consumption of the main meter at DVOR for the monsoon season.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 9;

input: What is the total consumption of the Main meter at Localizer for the last 24 hours?
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_local WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

input: Find the average true power for all phases combined for the AC meter at CNS.
query: SELECT AVG(true_power_total_avg) FROM ac_cns;

input: What is the average temperature at Glide Path when the consumption is above 10 kWh?
query: SELECT AVG(t.avg) FROM temp_glide t JOIN main_glide m ON t.time = m.time WHERE m.consumption > 10;

input: Find the average true power for the R-phase of the AC meter at Localizer.
query: SELECT AVG(true_power_r_avg) FROM ac_local;

input: Show the records where the voltage imbalance (R-Y) was more than 10V at CNS.
query: SELECT * FROM main_cns WHERE ABS(voltage_r_avg - voltage_y_avg) > 10 LIMIT 50;

input: Show me any instances where the temperature at Glide Path increased by more than 5 degrees in a single hour.
query: SELECT time, avg, LAG(avg) OVER (ORDER BY time) as prev_avg FROM temp_glide WHERE (avg - LAG(avg) OVER (ORDER BY time)) > 5;

input: What is the maximum total current drawn by the AC meter at Localizer on Wednesdays during the Monsoon season?
query: SELECT MAX(current_total_max) FROM ac_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 3 AND EXTRACT(month from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 9;

input: Calculate the average energy saved (difference in consumption) at the Localizer during nighttime hours (10 PM to 6 AM) compared to daytime.
query: SELECT AVG(consumption) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 22 OR EXTRACT(hour from time) < 6;

input: Identify hours where the true power total was zero for the AC meter at Glide Path.
query: SELECT time FROM ac_glide WHERE true_power_total_avg = 0;

input: Identify if there were any 'Zero Load' events (True Power < 0.1) on the Main meter at CNS when the temperature was above 40°C.
query: SELECT m.time FROM main_cns m JOIN temp_cns t ON m.time = t.time WHERE m.true_power_total_avg < 0.1 AND t.max > 40;

input: How many hours in the last month did the UPS1 at CNS operate with a power factor below 0.75?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ups1_cns WHERE pf_avg_avg < 0.75 AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month';

input: What is the average true power for UPS2 at Glide Path on Friday nights?
query: SELECT AVG(true_power_total_avg) FROM ups2_glide WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 5 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 20;

input: Show me the maximum frequency reached at the Glide Path location today.
query: SELECT MAX(freq_max) FROM main_glide WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE;

input: Which day of the week, on average, has the lowest voltage stability at the DVOR location?
query: SELECT EXTRACT(DOW from time) AS day_of_week FROM main_dvor GROUP BY day_of_week ORDER BY AVG(voltage_avg_avg) ASC LIMIT 1;

input: What is the standard deviation of the true power total for the entire network during the last month?
query: SELECT STDDEV(val) FROM (SELECT true_power_total_avg as val FROM main_cns WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' UNION ALL SELECT true_power_total_avg FROM main_dvor WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' UNION ALL SELECT true_power_total_avg FROM main_local WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month' UNION ALL SELECT true_power_total_avg FROM main_glide WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month') AS network_std;

input: Calculate the total kWh saved at the DVOR location assuming consumption would have been 10% higher if not for optimization.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption * 1.1) - SUM(consumption) as energy_saved FROM main_dvor;

input: What is the average daily consumption of the AC meter at Glide Path in August?
query: SELECT AVG(consumption) FROM ac_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 8;

input: Show the average current of the Y-phase for all UPS1 meters across the network combined.
query: SELECT AVG(current_y_avg) FROM (SELECT current_y_avg FROM ups1_cns UNION ALL SELECT current_y_avg FROM ups1_dvor UNION ALL SELECT current_y_avg FROM ups1_local UNION ALL SELECT current_y_avg FROM ups1_glide) AS all_ups1;

input: Compare the daily average consumption of Main meter at CNS vs Localizer.
query: SELECT c.time::date, AVG(c.consumption) as cns_c, AVG(l.consumption) as loc_c FROM main_cns c JOIN main_local l ON c.time = l.time GROUP BY c.time::date;

input: Show me the maximum and minimum voltage recorded for the B-phase at DVOR in the Monsoon season
query: SELECT MAX(voltage_b_max), MIN(voltage_b_min) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM time) IN (6, 7, 8, 9);

input: Calculate the total energy used by the Main meter at Localizer on every Wednesday in 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 3 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: What was the maximum energy consumption of the AC meter at DVOR during the hottest month of the Summer season?
query: SELECT MAX(consumption) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) >= 2 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 5;

input: Find the maximum apparent power recorded on any B-phase across all sub-meters at the Localizer site.
query: SELECT MAX(max_val) FROM (SELECT MAX(apparent_power_b_max) as max_val FROM ac_local UNION ALL SELECT MAX(apparent_power_b_max) FROM ups1_local UNION ALL SELECT MAX(apparent_power_b_max) FROM ups2_local) AS local_subs;

input: Identify the day with the highest 'Voltage Sag' count (voltage < 200V) across all meters at CNS.
query: SELECT time::date, COUNT(*) as sag_count FROM (SELECT time FROM main_cns WHERE voltage_r_min < 200 UNION ALL SELECT time FROM ac_cns WHERE voltage_r_min < 200) AS all_sags GROUP BY time::date ORDER BY sag_count DESC LIMIT 1;

input: What is the total kWh used at CNS on August 15th, 2023?
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_cns WHERE time::date = '2023-08-15';

input: What is the latest recorded temperature at the CNS location?
query: SELECT avg, max, min, time FROM temp_cns ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1;

input: What is the average line-to-line voltage for the RB phase for the UPS1 meter at DVOR on Mondays?
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_rb_avg) FROM ups1_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(DOW FROM time) = 1;

input: What is the correlation between the frequency and the total true power at the Glide Path location?
query: SELECT CORR(freq_avg, true_power_total_avg) FROM main_glide;

input: What is the highest recorded RY phase voltage for the UPS2 meter at Glide Path during the Winter season?
query: SELECT MAX(voltage_ry_max) FROM ups2_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1);

input: Show the average voltage imbalance (Difference between highest and lowest phase voltage) for each location for 2023.
query: SELECT 'CNS' as loc, AVG(GREATEST(voltage_r_avg, voltage_y_avg, voltage_b_avg) - LEAST(voltage_r_avg, voltage_y_avg, voltage_b_avg)) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'DVOR', AVG(GREATEST(voltage_r_avg, voltage_y_avg, voltage_b_avg) - LEAST(voltage_r_avg, voltage_y_avg, voltage_b_avg)) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Calculate the total energy used by the AC meter at CNS on January 1st, 2024.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ac_cns WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM time) = 2024 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM time) = 1 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM time) = 1;

input: Find the average frequency at DVOR when both the AC meter and Main meter showed consumption above 5 kWh.
query: SELECT AVG(m.freq_avg) FROM main_dvor m JOIN ac_dvor a ON m.time = a.time WHERE m.consumption > 5 AND a.consumption > 5;

input: Identify the month with the most 'Voltage Sags' (voltage below 210V) for the AC meter at Glide Path.
query: SELECT EXTRACT(month from time) AS month FROM ac_glide WHERE voltage_r_min < 210 OR voltage_y_min < 210 OR voltage_b_min < 210 GROUP BY month ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

input: What is the standard deviation of the frequency for the Main meter at DVOR during the Summer season?
query: SELECT STDDEV(freq_avg) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (2, 3, 4, 5);

input: What is the total energy consumption of all Main meters across all locations for March 2023?
query: SELECT SUM(d.consumption + c.consumption + l.consumption + g.consumption) FROM main_dvor d JOIN main_cns c ON d.time = c.time JOIN main_local l ON d.time = l.time JOIN main_glide g ON d.time = g.time WHERE EXTRACT(month from d.time) = 3 AND EXTRACT(year from d.time) = 2023;

input: Show the records where the frequency was unstable (variation > 0.5 Hz) at Localizer.
query: SELECT * FROM main_local WHERE (freq_max - freq_min) > 0.5 LIMIT 50;

input: Compare the average current of UPS units at Glide Path during the morning shift (6 AM to 2 PM) and evening shift (2 PM to 10 PM).
query: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) <= 13 THEN 'Morning' ELSE 'Evening' END as shift, AVG(current_total_avg) FROM ups1_glide WHERE EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) <= 21 GROUP BY shift;

input: What is the maximum current recorded on the Y-phase for UPS2 at DVOR?
query: SELECT MAX(current_y_max) FROM ups2_dvor;

input: How many instances are there where the maximum Y-phase voltage exceeded 250V at the Localizer?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM main_local WHERE voltage_y_max > 250;

input: Show the average temperature at Localizer on days when consumption was more than 15 kWh.
query: SELECT AVG(t.avg) FROM temp_local t JOIN main_local m ON t.time = m.time WHERE m.consumption > 15;

input: Compare the total consumption of the AC meter at DVOR in Summer vs Winter.
query: SELECT (SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) >= 2 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 5) AS summer_total, (SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10,11,12,1)) AS winter_total;

input: Show me the maximum frequency reached at the Glide Path location today.
query: SELECT MAX(freq_max) FROM main_glide WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE;

input: What is the peak-to-peak voltage variation for the RY phase at Localizer for the entire winter season?
query: SELECT MAX(voltage_ry_max) - MIN(voltage_ry_min) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10,11,12,1);

input: What is the ratio of peak current to average current for the Main meter at CNS during the Monsoon season?
query: SELECT (MAX(current_total_max) / NULLIF(AVG(current_total_avg), 0)) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (6, 7, 8, 9);

input: What is the maximum difference in current between the R-phase and B-phase for the Main meter at DVOR during the Winter season?
query: SELECT MAX(ABS(current_r_max - current_b_min)) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1);

input: What is the total consumption of UPS1 across all locations for the current year 2026?
query: SELECT SUM(total) FROM (SELECT consumption as total FROM ups1_cns WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2026 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ups1_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2026 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ups1_local WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2026 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ups1_glide WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2026) AS all_ups1;

input: Show the average voltage of the R phase for UPS2 at the localizer during the summer season.
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_r_avg) FROM ups2_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (2, 3, 4, 5);

input: Find the maximum total apparent power recorded by the main meter at CNS.
query: SELECT MAX(apparent_power_total_max) FROM main_cns;

input: Show the minimum frequency for the Main meter at CNS during the last 48 hours.
query: SELECT MIN(freq_min) FROM main_cns WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours';

input: Which location's Main meter had the lowest average Y-phase voltage in 2023?
query: WITH avg_voltages AS (SELECT 'DVOR' AS location_name, AVG(voltage_y_avg) AS avg_v FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'Glide Path', AVG(voltage_y_avg) FROM main_glide WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'Localizer', AVG(voltage_y_avg) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'CNS', AVG(voltage_y_avg) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023) SELECT location_name, avg_v FROM avg_voltages ORDER BY avg_v ASC LIMIT 1;

input: Identify hours where the true power total was zero for the AC meter at Glide Path.
query: SELECT time FROM ac_glide WHERE true_power_total_avg = 0;

input: Show me the voltage fluctuation for the RB phase at CNS on holiday (Sunday).
query: SELECT (MAX(voltage_rb_max) - MIN(voltage_rb_min)) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0;

input: What is the difference between the maximum and minimum average power factor for the UPS1 meter at the Localizer in November?
query: SELECT MAX(pf_avg_max) - MIN(pf_avg_min) FROM ups1_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 11;

input: Find the average true power for the R-phase at CNS during hours where the power factor was below 0.85.
query: SELECT AVG(true_power_r_avg) FROM main_cns WHERE pf_r_avg < 0.85;

input: How often did the R-phase voltage exceed 250V at the DVOR Main meter in 2023?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM main_dvor WHERE voltage_r_max > 250 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: What is the maximum current drawn by UPS2 at Localizer on weekdays versus weekends?
query: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW from time) IN (0,6) THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END as type, MAX(current_total_max) FROM ups2_local GROUP BY type;

input: What is the total energy leakage (Main - Submeters) at CNS for the last 24 hours?
query: SELECT SUM(m.consumption) - SUM(a.consumption + u1.consumption + u2.consumption) FROM main_cns m JOIN ac_cns a ON m.time = a.time JOIN ups1_cns u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_cns u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE m.time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

input: Show me the top 3 locations with the highest temperature variation (Max - Min) in December.
query: SELECT location_name FROM temp_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 12 GROUP BY location_name ORDER BY (MAX(max) - MIN(min)) DESC LIMIT 3;

input: Identify the timestamp when the R-phase voltage was highest across all Main meters in the entire network.
query: SELECT time, voltage_r_max, 'CNS' as loc FROM main_cns UNION ALL SELECT time, voltage_r_max, 'DVOR' FROM main_dvor UNION ALL SELECT time, voltage_r_max, 'Localizer' FROM main_local UNION ALL SELECT time, voltage_r_max, 'Glide Path' FROM main_glide ORDER BY voltage_r_max DESC LIMIT 1;

input: What is the maximum R-phase current recorded for UPS1 at Glide Path?
query: SELECT MAX(current_r_max) FROM ups1_glide;

input: Compare the average total true power of AC meter at CNS between morning and night.
query: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM time) <= 18 THEN 'Day' ELSE 'Night' END AS time_period, AVG(true_power_total_avg) FROM ac_cns GROUP BY time_period;

input: Calculate the hourly average apparent power for the network during the most recent 6-hour window.
query: SELECT AVG(val) FROM (SELECT apparent_power_total_avg as val FROM main_cns WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours' UNION ALL SELECT apparent_power_total_avg FROM main_dvor WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours') AS recent_network;

input: Are there any instances where the voltage of the Y-phase dropped to zero at the DVOR AC meter?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ac_dvor WHERE voltage_y_min = 0;

input: Compare the daily average voltage of R-phase at CNS vs DVOR.
query: SELECT c.time::date, AVG(c.voltage_r_avg) as cns_v, AVG(d.voltage_r_avg) as dvor_v FROM main_cns c JOIN main_dvor d ON c.time = d.time GROUP BY c.time::date;

input: What is the average hourly consumption trend for the Main meter at CNS during the hottest week of May?
query: SELECT AVG(consumption) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 5 AND EXTRACT(day from time) >= 16 AND EXTRACT(day from time) <= 22;

input: What percentage of the Main meter's total consumption at CNS comes strictly from the AC meter during the Summer season?
query: SELECT (SUM(a.consumption) / NULLIF(SUM(m.consumption), 0)) * 100 AS ac_percentage FROM main_cns m LEFT JOIN ac_cns a ON m.time = a.time WHERE EXTRACT(month from m.time) >= 2 AND EXTRACT(month from m.time) <= 5;

input: Show the records where the voltage imbalance (R-Y) was more than 10V at CNS.
query: SELECT * FROM main_cns WHERE ABS(voltage_r_avg - voltage_y_avg) > 10 LIMIT 50;

input: Which month had the highest energy consumption for the UPS1 meter at Localizer?
query: SELECT EXTRACT(month from time) AS month, SUM(consumption) AS total_consumption FROM ups1_local GROUP BY month ORDER BY total_consumption DESC LIMIT 1;

input: Find the average temperature at each location during the hour when the Main meter consumption was at its peak.
query: SELECT 'CNS' as loc, t.avg FROM temp_cns t JOIN main_cns m ON t.time = m.time WHERE m.consumption = (SELECT MAX(consumption) FROM main_cns) UNION ALL SELECT 'DVOR', t.avg FROM temp_dvor t JOIN main_dvor m ON t.time = m.time WHERE m.consumption = (SELECT MAX(consumption) FROM main_dvor);

input: Which phase (R, Y, or B) had the lowest average voltage at CNS in 2023?
query: SELECT 'R' AS phase, AVG(voltage_r_avg) AS avg_v FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'Y', AVG(voltage_y_avg) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'B', AVG(voltage_b_avg) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM time) = 2023 ORDER BY avg_v ASC LIMIT 1;

input: Find the maximum temperature recorded at the Localizer during the Monsoon.
query: SELECT MAX(max) FROM temp_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (6, 7, 8, 9);

input: Identify hours where the voltage imbalance between CNS and DVOR Main meters exceeded 10V on the R-phase.
query: SELECT c.time, ABS(c.voltage_r_avg - d.voltage_r_avg) as v_diff FROM main_cns c JOIN main_dvor d ON c.time = d.time WHERE ABS(c.voltage_r_avg - d.voltage_r_avg) > 10;

input: Which location's Main meter had the lowest average Y-phase voltage in 2023?
query: WITH avg_voltages AS (SELECT 'DVOR' AS location_name, AVG(voltage_y_avg) AS avg_v FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'Glide Path', AVG(voltage_y_avg) FROM main_glide WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'Localizer', AVG(voltage_y_avg) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'CNS', AVG(voltage_y_avg) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023) SELECT location_name, avg_v FROM avg_voltages ORDER BY avg_v ASC LIMIT 1;

input: What is the ratio of UPS consumption to total Main consumption at the CNS site for the last month?
query: SELECT SUM(u1.consumption + u2.consumption) / NULLIF(SUM(m.consumption), 0) FROM main_cns m JOIN ups1_cns u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_cns u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE m.time > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 month';

input: Find the average power factor for the Main meter at DVOR during the monsoon nights.
query: SELECT AVG(pf_avg_avg) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (6, 7, 8, 9) AND (EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 20 OR EXTRACT(hour from time) < 6);

input: Calculate the total energy consumption for the Main meter at DVOR during the entire Summer season.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) >= 2 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 5;

input: What is the average daily consumption of the AC meter at Localizer during the Monsoon season?
query: SELECT AVG(consumption) FROM ac_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (6, 7, 8, 9);

input: What is the maximum total current drawn by the AC meter at Localizer on Wednesdays during the Monsoon season?
query: SELECT MAX(current_total_max) FROM ac_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 3 AND EXTRACT(month from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 9;

input: List the dates where the total energy used at the site was less than the energy used by the AC meter alone (Data Anomaly Check).
query: SELECT m.time::date FROM main_cns m JOIN ac_cns a ON m.time = a.time WHERE m.consumption < a.consumption;

input: What is the average line voltage RY for the Main meter at CNS during winter mornings?
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_ry_avg) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1) AND EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) <= 11;

input: What is the count of voltage fluctuations (deviations > 6%) for the UPS1 meter at CNS?
query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN (voltage_r_max - voltage_r_min) / NULLIF(((voltage_r_max + voltage_r_min) / 2), 0) * 100 > 6 THEN 1 END) AS fluctuation_r, COUNT(CASE WHEN (voltage_y_max - voltage_y_min) / NULLIF(((voltage_y_max + voltage_y_min) / 2), 0) * 100 > 6 THEN 1 END) AS fluctuation_y, COUNT(CASE WHEN (voltage_b_max - voltage_b_min) / NULLIF(((voltage_b_max + voltage_b_min) / 2), 0) * 100 > 6 THEN 1 END) AS fluctuation_b FROM ups1_cns;

input: Find the average true power for the Main meter at Localizer on Wednesdays in July.
query: SELECT AVG(true_power_total_avg) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW FROM time) = 3 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM time) = 7;

input: Identify the location where the average voltage on the R-phase was the lowest yesterday.
query: SELECT location_name, avg_v FROM (SELECT 'CNS' as location_name, AVG(voltage_r_avg) as avg_v FROM main_cns WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' UNION ALL SELECT 'DVOR', AVG(voltage_r_avg) FROM main_dvor WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' UNION ALL SELECT 'Localizer', AVG(voltage_r_avg) FROM main_local WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' UNION ALL SELECT 'Glide Path', AVG(voltage_r_avg) FROM main_glide WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') AS all_locs ORDER BY avg_v ASC LIMIT 1;

input: Find the maximum total apparent power recorded by the main meter at CNS.
query: SELECT MAX(apparent_power_total_max) FROM main_cns;

input: Find the minimum power factor recorded for the B-phase of UPS2 at Localizer.
query: SELECT MIN(pf_b_min) FROM ups2_local;

input: What is the average line voltage YB for UPS1 at DVOR during the winter?
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_yb_avg) FROM ups1_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1);

input: Compare the average temperature between Localizer and Glide Path for December.
query: SELECT 'Localizer' as loc, AVG(avg) FROM temp_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time)=12 UNION ALL SELECT 'Glide Path', AVG(avg) FROM temp_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time)=12;

input: What was the minimum temperature at DVOR location during the last 30 days?
query: SELECT MIN(min) FROM temp_dvor WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';

input: Calculate the total kWh of UPS1 at Glide Path for the monsoon season 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ups1_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 9 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: What is the maximum current drawn by UPS2 at Localizer on weekdays versus weekends?
query: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW from time) IN (0,6) THEN 'Weekend' ELSE 'Weekday' END as type, MAX(current_total_max) FROM ups2_local GROUP BY type;

input: How many times did the frequency drop below 49.5 Hz on the main meter at DVOR on Mondays?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM main_dvor WHERE freq_min < 49.5 AND EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 1;

input: Show the daily consumption trend for UPS1 at CNS for the last week.
query: SELECT time::date, SUM(consumption) FROM ups1_cns WHERE time > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY time::date ORDER BY time::date;

input: What is the total energy consumption of the UPS2 meter at Localizer specifically on weekends during the Summer season?
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ups2_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW FROM time) IN (0, 6) AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM time) IN (2, 3, 4, 5);

input: What is the total unaccounted energy consumption at Localizer by subtracting the AC, UPS1, and UPS2 consumption from the Main meter in February?
query: SELECT SUM(m.consumption) - (SUM(a.consumption) + SUM(u1.consumption) + SUM(u2.consumption)) AS unaccounted_energy FROM main_local m LEFT JOIN ac_local a ON m.time = a.time LEFT JOIN ups1_local u1 ON m.time = u1.time LEFT JOIN ups2_local u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE EXTRACT(month from m.time) = 2;

input: Calculate the difference between average R-phase and B-phase voltage at CNS today.
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_r_avg) - AVG(voltage_b_avg) FROM main_cns WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE;

input: Categorize the daily consumption at Localizer as 'Low' (<10), 'Medium' (10-25), or 'High' (>25).
query: SELECT time::date, SUM(consumption), CASE WHEN SUM(consumption) < 10 THEN 'Low' WHEN SUM(consumption) >= 10 AND SUM(consumption) <= 25 THEN 'Medium' ELSE 'High' END as category FROM main_local GROUP BY time::date;

input: Count the exact number of times the average power factor dropped below 0.85 for the UPS1 meter at DVOR.
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ups1_dvor WHERE pf_avg_avg < 0.85;

input: Identify the timestamp when the R-phase voltage was highest across all Main meters in the entire network.
query: SELECT time, voltage_r_max, 'CNS' as loc FROM main_cns UNION ALL SELECT time, voltage_r_max, 'DVOR' FROM main_dvor UNION ALL SELECT time, voltage_r_max, 'Localizer' FROM main_local UNION ALL SELECT time, voltage_r_max, 'Glide Path' FROM main_glide ORDER BY voltage_r_max DESC LIMIT 1;

input: Calculate the total kWh for the Main meter at Localizer for all Saturdays in 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 6 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Compare the average total true power between UPS1 and UPS2 at the glide path in July.
query: SELECT AVG(u1.true_power_total_avg) AS ups1_avg_power, AVG(u2.true_power_total_avg) AS ups2_avg_power FROM ups1_glide u1 LEFT JOIN ups2_glide u2 ON u1.time = u2.time WHERE EXTRACT(month from u1.time) = 7;

input: Find the total consumption of the Localizer site for the last holiday (Sunday).
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0 AND time::date = (SELECT MAX(time::date) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0);

input: What is the total consumption of the UPS1 meter at CNS for the whole year 2023?
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ups1_cns WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Compare the average temperature across all locations for the month of January.
query: SELECT 'CNS' as location_name, AVG(avg) FROM temp_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'DVOR', AVG(avg) FROM temp_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Localizer', AVG(avg) FROM temp_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Glide Path', AVG(avg) FROM temp_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 1;

input: Show the dates where the combined consumption of UPS1 and UPS2 at any location exceeded 50 kWh.
query: SELECT time::date, 'Localizer' as loc FROM ups1_local u1 JOIN ups2_local u2 ON u1.time = u2.time WHERE (u1.consumption + u2.consumption) > 50 UNION ALL SELECT time::date, 'Glide Path' FROM ups1_glide u1 JOIN ups2_glide u2 ON u1.time = u2.time WHERE (u1.consumption + u2.consumption) > 50;

input: What was the maximum energy consumption of the AC meter at DVOR during the hottest month of the Summer season?
query: SELECT MAX(consumption) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) >= 2 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 5;

input: Find the average true power for UPS1 at DVOR on Thursdays in May.
query: SELECT AVG(true_power_total_avg) FROM ups1_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 4 AND EXTRACT(month from time) = 5;

input: Find any 1-hour interval where the AC meter at DVOR consumed more than 50% of the Main meter's total consumption.
query: SELECT a.time, a.consumption, m.consumption FROM ac_dvor a JOIN main_dvor m ON a.time = m.time WHERE a.consumption > (m.consumption * 0.5);

input: Calculate the total energy cost for the CNS location in January, assuming a rate of 7 units per kWh.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption * 7) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 1;

input: Show the top 3 records with the highest frequency at Localizer Main meter.
query: SELECT time, freq_max FROM main_local ORDER BY freq_max DESC LIMIT 3;

input: What is the average current for the R-phase at DVOR during the early morning (4 AM to 8 AM)?
query: SELECT AVG(current_r_avg) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 4 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) <= 8;

input: Show the hourly consumption trend for the entire CNS site (Main + AC + UPS1 + UPS2) for the last 24 hours.
query: SELECT m.time, (m.consumption + a.consumption + u1.consumption + u2.consumption) as total_site_load FROM main_cns m JOIN ac_cns a ON m.time = a.time JOIN ups1_cns u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_cns u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE m.time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY m.time;

input: Calculate the total energy consumption of all sub-meters (AC, UPS1, UPS2) across all locations combined for January 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(sub_total) FROM (SELECT consumption AS sub_total FROM ac_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time)=1 AND EXTRACT(year from time)=2023 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ups1_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time)=1 AND EXTRACT(year from time)=2023 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ups2_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time)=1 AND EXTRACT(year from time)=2023 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time)=1 AND EXTRACT(year from time)=2023 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ups1_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time)=1 AND EXTRACT(year from time)=2023 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ups2_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time)=1 AND EXTRACT(year from time)=2023) AS all_subs;

input: Give me the average current for all phases of the AC meter at CNS during winter.
query: SELECT AVG(current_r_avg) AS avg_current_r, AVG(current_y_avg) AS avg_current_y, AVG(current_b_avg) AS avg_current_b FROM ac_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1);

input: Calculate the total energy 'lost' or 'unaccounted' (Main - Sum of all Subs) at the Localizer for each day of the current week.
query: SELECT m.time::date, SUM(m.consumption) - SUM(a.consumption + u1.consumption + u2.consumption) as loss FROM main_local m JOIN ac_local a ON m.time = a.time JOIN ups1_local u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_local u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE EXTRACT(week from m.time) = EXTRACT(week from CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY m.time::date;

input: Show the average voltage of the R-phase for the Main meter at DVOR on Mondays in the Summer season.
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_r_avg) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 1 AND EXTRACT(month from time) IN (2, 3, 4, 5);

input: Calculate the total energy used by all Main meters during times when the temperature was above 40 degrees at any location.
query: SELECT SUM(m.consumption) FROM main_cns m JOIN temp_cns t ON m.time = t.time WHERE t.max > 40;

input: Show the minimum frequency recorded at CNS yesterday.
query: SELECT MIN(freq_min) FROM main_cns WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day';

input: Identify if the voltage ever crossed 260V at any meter in DVOR.
query: SELECT * FROM main_dvor WHERE voltage_r_max > 260 OR voltage_y_max > 260 OR voltage_b_max > 260 LIMIT 10;

input: How many records show a frequency below 49 Hz at any location?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT freq_min FROM main_dvor UNION ALL SELECT freq_min FROM main_glide UNION ALL SELECT freq_min FROM main_local UNION ALL SELECT freq_min FROM main_cns) AS all_freqs WHERE freq_min < 49;

input: Find the maximum frequency deviation (Max - Min) recorded at any location on January 1st, 2026.
query: SELECT MAX(freq_max - freq_min) FROM (SELECT freq_max, freq_min FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2026 AND EXTRACT(month from time) = 1 AND EXTRACT(day from time) = 1 UNION ALL SELECT freq_max, freq_min FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2026 AND EXTRACT(month from time) = 1 AND EXTRACT(day from time) = 1) AS new_year_freq;

input: Compare the average current of UPS units at Glide Path during the morning shift (6 AM to 2 PM) and evening shift (2 PM to 10 PM).
query: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) <= 13 THEN 'Morning' ELSE 'Evening' END as shift, AVG(current_total_avg) FROM ups1_glide WHERE EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) <= 21 GROUP BY shift;

input: Which month had the highest peak current usage for the CNS Main meter in 2023?
query: SELECT EXTRACT(month from time) AS month, MAX(current_total_max) AS max_current FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 GROUP BY month ORDER BY max_current DESC LIMIT 1;

input: What is the seasonal behavior of the power factor on the B phase for the localizer main meter?
query: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM time) IN (2, 3, 4, 5) THEN 'Summer' WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM time) IN (6, 7, 8, 9) THEN 'Monsoon' WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1) THEN 'Winter' END AS season, AVG(pf_b_avg) AS avg_pf_b, MIN(pf_b_min) AS min_pf_b, MAX(pf_b_max) AS max_pf_b FROM main_local GROUP BY season;

input: Show the records where the frequency was unstable (variation > 0.5 Hz) at Localizer.
query: SELECT * FROM main_local WHERE (freq_max - freq_min) > 0.5 LIMIT 50;

input: Identify the dates where the voltage fluctuation exceeded 5% for the Main meter at CNS
query: SELECT time::date FROM main_cns WHERE (voltage_r_max - voltage_r_min) / NULLIF(((voltage_r_max + voltage_r_min) / 2), 0) * 100 > 5 OR (voltage_y_max - voltage_y_min) / NULLIF(((voltage_y_max + voltage_y_min) / 2), 0) * 100 > 5 OR (voltage_b_max - voltage_b_min) / NULLIF(((voltage_b_max + voltage_b_min) / 2), 0) * 100 > 5;

input: Show me the total consumption of the Main meter at CNS for all Mondays in 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(DOW FROM time) = 1 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM time) = 2023;

input: Are there any instances where the UPS2 at CNS recorded higher consumption than the Main meter at the same time?
query: SELECT u.time, u.consumption as ups_val, m.consumption as main_val FROM ups2_cns u JOIN main_cns m ON u.time = m.time WHERE u.consumption > m.consumption;

input: Show me all high consumption events (>20 kWh) for the AC meter at DVOR.
query: SELECT time, consumption FROM ac_dvor WHERE consumption > 20 ORDER BY time DESC;

input: Identify the time when the maximum temperature was reached at CNS yesterday.
query: SELECT time, max FROM temp_cns WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' ORDER BY max DESC LIMIT 1;

input: Show me the most recent voltage reading for the R-phase of the Main meter at DVOR.
query: SELECT voltage_r_avg, voltage_r_max, voltage_r_min, time FROM main_dvor ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1;

input: What is the current average frequency at the Glide Path location?
query: SELECT freq_avg FROM main_glide ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1;

input: Find the maximum line-to-line voltage recorded on any sub-meter at the Glide Path site.
query: SELECT MAX(max_v) FROM (SELECT MAX(voltage_ry_max) AS max_v FROM ac_glide UNION ALL SELECT MAX(voltage_ry_max) FROM ups1_glide UNION ALL SELECT MAX(voltage_ry_max) FROM ups2_glide) AS all_subs;

input: Find the highest voltage recorded on the B-phase for the AC meter at Localizer.
query: SELECT MAX(voltage_b_max) FROM ac_local;

input: Show the top 5 records where the voltage imbalance between R and B phases was the highest at Glide Path.
query: SELECT time, ABS(voltage_r_avg - voltage_b_avg) as imbalance FROM main_glide ORDER BY imbalance DESC LIMIT 5;

input: How many times did the power factor for all phases fall below 0.80 at the CNS location?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM main_cns WHERE pf_r_avg < 0.80 OR pf_y_avg < 0.80 OR pf_b_avg < 0.80;

input: Identify hours where the current total was exactly zero for the AC meter at CNS.
query: SELECT time FROM ac_cns WHERE current_total_avg = 0;

input: Calculate the total kWh for the AC meter at Localizer on every Sunday in 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ac_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Identify days where the AC meter consumption at DVOR was higher than the Main meter.
query: SELECT a.time::date FROM ac_dvor a JOIN main_dvor m ON a.time = m.time WHERE a.consumption > m.consumption;

input: Find the difference between max and min frequency at Localizer yesterday.
query: SELECT MAX(freq_max) - MIN(freq_min) FROM main_local WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day';

input: Compare the average consumption of UPS1 and UPS2 at DVOR for the entire year.
query: SELECT AVG(u1.consumption) AS avg_u1, AVG(u2.consumption) AS avg_u2 FROM ups1_dvor u1 JOIN ups2_dvor u2 ON u1.time = u2.time;

input: What is the average voltage for the R-phase at the Localizer during peak hours?
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_r_avg) FROM main_local;

input: Show me the voltage fluctuation for the RB phase at CNS on holiday (Sunday).
query: SELECT (MAX(voltage_rb_max) - MIN(voltage_rb_min)) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0;

input: Compare the total energy usage of UPS1 vs. UPS2 at the Localizer location for the month of March.
query: SELECT SUM(u1.consumption) AS ups1_total, SUM(u2.consumption) AS ups2_total FROM ups1_local u1 JOIN ups2_local u2 ON u1.time = u2.time WHERE EXTRACT(month from u1.time) = 3;

input: Calculate the total energy 'lost' or 'unaccounted' (Main - Sum of all Subs) at the Localizer for each day of the current week.
query: SELECT m.time::date, SUM(m.consumption) - SUM(a.consumption + u1.consumption + u2.consumption) as loss FROM main_local m JOIN ac_local a ON m.time = a.time JOIN ups1_local u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_local u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE EXTRACT(week from m.time) = EXTRACT(week from CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY m.time::date;

input: Compare the average energy efficiency (ratio of True Power to Apparent Power) between DVOR and Localizer for the year 2023.
query: SELECT 'DVOR' as loc, AVG(true_power_total_avg / NULLIF(apparent_power_total_avg, 0)) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'Localizer', AVG(true_power_total_avg / NULLIF(apparent_power_total_avg, 0)) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Is there a correlation between high temperatures and increased AC meter consumption at the DVOR location?
query: SELECT CORR(m.consumption, t.avg) FROM ac_dvor m JOIN temp_dvor t ON m.time = t.time;

input: List the total consumption for the Main meter at CNS during the month of May 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 5 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Identify if the power factor ever dropped below 0.7 for UPS1 at Glide Path.
query: SELECT * FROM ups1_glide WHERE pf_avg_min < 0.7 LIMIT 10;

input: List the daily maximum temperature for CNS in the last month.
query: SELECT time::date, MAX(max) FROM temp_cns WHERE time > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month' GROUP BY time::date ORDER BY time::date;

input: What is the percentage of total site energy used by the UPS systems at Localizer in February?
query: SELECT (SUM(u1.consumption + u2.consumption) / NULLIF(SUM(m.consumption), 0)) * 100 FROM main_local m JOIN ups1_local u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_local u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE EXTRACT(month from m.time) = 2;

input: Which sub-meter (AC, UPS1, or UPS2) consumed the most power at the Glide Path location in 2023?
query: WITH sub_consumption AS (SELECT 'AC' AS meter, SUM(consumption) AS total_c FROM ac_glide WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'UPS1', SUM(consumption) FROM ups1_glide WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 UNION ALL SELECT 'UPS2', SUM(consumption) FROM ups2_glide WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023) SELECT meter, total_c FROM sub_consumption ORDER BY total_c DESC LIMIT 1;

input: What is the average voltage for the YB phase strictly on weekends at the CNS Main meter?
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_yb_avg) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) IN (0, 6);

input: Find the exact timestamp when the Main meter at Glide Path recorded its absolute peak Apparent Power in 2023.
query: SELECT time FROM main_glide WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 ORDER BY apparent_power_total_max DESC LIMIT 1;

input: Calculate the total kWh of UPS2 at DVOR for the summer season 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ups2_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) >= 2 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 5 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Find the total consumption of the Localizer site for the last holiday (Sunday).
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0 AND time::date = (SELECT MAX(time::date) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0);

input: Identify the location where the average voltage on the R-phase was the lowest yesterday.
query: SELECT location_name, avg_v FROM (SELECT 'CNS' as location_name, AVG(voltage_r_avg) as avg_v FROM main_cns WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' UNION ALL SELECT 'DVOR', AVG(voltage_r_avg) FROM main_dvor WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' UNION ALL SELECT 'Localizer', AVG(voltage_r_avg) FROM main_local WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' UNION ALL SELECT 'Glide Path', AVG(voltage_r_avg) FROM main_glide WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day') AS all_locs ORDER BY avg_v ASC LIMIT 1;

input: Calculate the total energy used by the Main meter at CNS on holidays (Sundays).
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 0;

input: Show the maximum current reached on any phase at Glide Path when the temperature was at its absolute minimum.
query: SELECT GREATEST(current_r_max, current_y_max, current_b_max) FROM main_glide m JOIN temp_glide t ON m.time = t.time WHERE t.min = (SELECT MIN(min) FROM temp_glide);

input: Show the standard deviation of the voltage for the B-phase at Localizer for each month of 2023.
query: SELECT EXTRACT(month from time) as month, STDDEV(voltage_b_avg) FROM main_local WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

input: What was the minimum temperature at DVOR location during the last 30 days?
query: SELECT MIN(min) FROM temp_dvor WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';

input: What is the average daily consumption of the AC meter at Glide Path in August?
query: SELECT AVG(consumption) FROM ac_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 8;

input: What is the total apparent power usage for all meters at the CNS location combined?
query: SELECT SUM(m.apparent_power_total_avg) + SUM(a.apparent_power_total_avg) + SUM(u1.apparent_power_total_avg) + SUM(u2.apparent_power_total_avg) AS total_apparent_power FROM main_cns m JOIN ac_cns a ON m.time = a.time JOIN ups1_cns u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_cns u2 ON m.time = u2.time;

input: Show the records for UPS2 at CNS where R-phase voltage is below 210V.
query: SELECT * FROM ups2_cns WHERE voltage_r_avg < 210 LIMIT 50;

input: Find the average true power for UPS1 at DVOR on Thursdays in May.
query: SELECT AVG(true_power_total_avg) FROM ups1_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 4 AND EXTRACT(month from time) = 5;

input: Show the hourly consumption trend for the entire CNS site (Main + AC + UPS1 + UPS2) for the last 24 hours.
query: SELECT m.time, (m.consumption + a.consumption + u1.consumption + u2.consumption) as total_site_load FROM main_cns m JOIN ac_cns a ON m.time = a.time JOIN ups1_cns u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_cns u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE m.time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY m.time;

input: Calculate the difference between max and min R-phase current at DVOR yesterday.
query: SELECT MAX(current_r_max) - MIN(current_r_min) FROM main_dvor WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day';

input: What is the total consumption of UPS1 across all locations for the current year 2026?
query: SELECT SUM(total) FROM (SELECT consumption as total FROM ups1_cns WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2026 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ups1_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2026 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ups1_local WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2026 UNION ALL SELECT consumption FROM ups1_glide WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2026) AS all_ups1;

input: Calculate the total energy used by UPS2 at Localizer on Tuesdays.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ups2_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 2;

input: What is the average total apparent power for the network during the 1st week of August?
query: SELECT AVG(val) FROM (SELECT apparent_power_total_avg as val FROM main_cns WHERE time >= '2023-08-01' AND time <= '2023-08-07' UNION ALL SELECT apparent_power_total_avg FROM main_dvor WHERE time >= '2023-08-01' AND time <= '2023-08-07') AS network_week;

input: Identify instances where UPS2 consumption at CNS was exactly zero between 10 PM and 4 AM.
query: SELECT time FROM ups2_cns WHERE consumption = 0 AND (EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 22 OR EXTRACT(hour from time) < 4);

input: Find the timestamp where the power factor on all phases at CNS was at its absolute maximum.
query: SELECT time FROM main_cns ORDER BY pf_avg_max DESC LIMIT 1;

input: Calculate the average total apparent power for the UPS2 meter at Glide Path during the Winter season.
query: SELECT AVG(apparent_power_total_avg) FROM ups2_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1);

input: Which sub-meter (AC or UPS) at the Glide Path shows the most consistent power usage during the Winter season?
query: SELECT 'AC' as meter FROM ac_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1) UNION ALL SELECT 'UPS1' FROM ups1_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1) LIMIT 1;

input: Show the average current of the Y-phase for all UPS1 meters across the network combined.
query: SELECT AVG(current_y_avg) FROM (SELECT current_y_avg FROM ups1_cns UNION ALL SELECT current_y_avg FROM ups1_dvor UNION ALL SELECT current_y_avg FROM ups1_local UNION ALL SELECT current_y_avg FROM ups1_glide) AS all_ups1;

input: What is the average current for the B-phase at Glide Path during the evening (6 PM to 10 PM)?
query: SELECT AVG(current_b_avg) FROM main_glide WHERE EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 18 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) <= 22;

input: Compare the average frequency (freq_avg) of DVOR and CNS for the month of December.
query: SELECT 'DVOR' as loc, AVG(freq_avg) FROM main_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 12 UNION ALL SELECT 'CNS', AVG(freq_avg) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 12;

input: How many records at CNS show a Y-phase voltage above 255V?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM main_cns WHERE voltage_y_max > 255;

input: List the average line-to-line voltage RB for the AC meter at CNS on Mondays.
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_rb_avg) FROM ac_cns WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) = 1;

input: What is the average voltage on the R-phase for the AC meter at DVOR during peak hours (10 AM to 5 PM)?
query: SELECT AVG(voltage_r_avg) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 10 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) <= 17;

input: Show the top 5 records where the voltage imbalance between R and B phases was the highest at Glide Path.
query: SELECT time, ABS(voltage_r_avg - voltage_b_avg) as imbalance FROM main_glide ORDER BY imbalance DESC LIMIT 5;

input: Which month had the highest energy consumption for the UPS1 meter at Localizer?
query: SELECT EXTRACT(month from time) AS month, SUM(consumption) AS total_consumption FROM ups1_local GROUP BY EXTRACT(month from time) ORDER BY total_consumption DESC LIMIT 1;

input: Calculate the total energy used by UPS2 at Glide Path on weekends during the winter season.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ups2_glide WHERE EXTRACT(DOW from time) IN (0, 6) AND EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1);

input: Are there any records where the R-phase current is significantly higher (more than 20% difference) than the B-phase current at the Localizer?
query: SELECT time FROM main_local WHERE current_r_avg > (current_b_avg * 1.2);

input: Find the average frequency for the AC meter at Localizer on Saturdays.
query: SELECT AVG(freq_avg) FROM ac_local WHERE EXTRACT(DOW FROM time) = 6;

input: Show me all high consumption events (>20 kWh) for the AC meter at DVOR.
query: SELECT time, consumption FROM ac_dvor WHERE consumption > 20 ORDER BY time DESC;

input: What is the count of voltage fluctuations (deviations > 6%) for the UPS1 meter at CNS?
query: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN (voltage_r_max - voltage_r_min) / NULLIF(((voltage_r_max + voltage_r_min) / 2), 0) * 100 > 6 THEN 1 END) AS fluctuation_r, COUNT(CASE WHEN (voltage_y_max - voltage_y_min) / NULLIF(((voltage_y_max + voltage_y_min) / 2), 0) * 100 > 6 THEN 1 END) AS fluctuation_y, COUNT(CASE WHEN (voltage_b_max - voltage_b_min) / NULLIF(((voltage_b_max + voltage_b_min) / 2), 0) * 100 > 6 THEN 1 END) AS fluctuation_b FROM ups1_cns;

input: What is the average true power for the Glide Path Main meter during winter mornings (6 AM to 10 AM) versus summer mornings?
query: SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1) THEN 'Winter' ELSE 'Summer' END as season, AVG(true_power_total_avg) FROM main_glide WHERE EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(hour from time) <= 10 GROUP BY season;

input: How often did the R-phase voltage exceed 250V at the DVOR Main meter in 2023?
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM main_dvor WHERE voltage_r_max > 250 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Calculate the average current per phase for the AC meter at DVOR during the monsoon nights (7 PM to 6 AM).
query: SELECT AVG(current_r_avg), AVG(current_y_avg), AVG(current_b_avg) FROM ac_dvor WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (6, 7, 8, 9) AND (EXTRACT(hour from time) >= 19 OR EXTRACT(hour from time) < 6);

input: List the top 5 days where the temperature variation at the Glide Path location was the highest.
query: SELECT time::date, (MAX(max) - MIN(min)) as variation FROM temp_glide GROUP BY time::date ORDER BY variation DESC LIMIT 5;

input: Show the maximum frequency for the AC meter at Glide Path during the last 24 hours.
query: SELECT MAX(freq_max) FROM ac_glide WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours';

input: What is the total consumption of all sub-meters (AC, UPS1, UPS2) at the DVOR location in October?
query: SELECT SUM(a.consumption) + SUM(u1.consumption) + SUM(u2.consumption) AS total_submeter_consumption FROM ac_dvor a JOIN ups1_dvor u1 ON a.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_dvor u2 ON a.time = u2.time WHERE EXTRACT(month from a.time) = 10;

input: Check if there are any null values for voltage readings in the UPS1 table at Glide Path for January.
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ups1_glide WHERE (voltage_r_avg IS NULL OR voltage_y_avg IS NULL OR voltage_b_avg IS NULL) AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM time) = 1;

input: List the dates where at least two different locations recorded a frequency drop below 49.5 Hz at the exact same time.
query: SELECT c.time FROM main_cns c JOIN main_dvor d ON c.time = d.time WHERE c.freq_min < 49.5 AND d.freq_min < 49.5;

input: Identify the time when the minimum temperature was reached at DVOR today.
query: SELECT time, min FROM temp_dvor WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY min ASC LIMIT 1;

input: Show me the maximum R-phase voltage for the AC meter at CNS exclusively during the months of March and April.
query: SELECT MAX(voltage_r_max) FROM ac_cns WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (3, 4);

input: Compare the daily total consumption of sub-meters at CNS versus the Main meter for the last 7 days.
query: SELECT m.time::date, m.consumption AS main_total, (a.consumption + u1.consumption + u2.consumption) AS sub_total FROM main_cns m JOIN ac_cns a ON m.time = a.time JOIN ups1_cns u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_cns u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE m.time > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days';

input: What is the difference between the maximum and minimum average power factor for the UPS1 meter at the Localizer in November?
query: SELECT MAX(pf_avg_max) - MIN(pf_avg_min) FROM ups1_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 11;

input: List any dates where the Main meter recorded data but all sub-meters (AC, UPS1, UPS2) recorded null or zero values.
query: SELECT m.time::date FROM main_cns m JOIN ac_cns a ON m.time = a.time JOIN ups1_cns u1 ON m.time = u1.time JOIN ups2_cns u2 ON m.time = u2.time WHERE m.consumption > 0 AND a.consumption = 0 AND u1.consumption = 0 AND u2.consumption = 0;

input: What was the longest duration (in hours) that the UPS1 meter at CNS showed zero consumption in 2023?
query: SELECT MAX(duration) FROM (SELECT time - LAG(time) OVER (ORDER BY time) as duration FROM ups1_cns WHERE consumption = 0 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023) as zero_events;

input: Identify hours at CNS where the R-phase current was higher than both Y and B phases combined.
query: SELECT time FROM main_cns WHERE current_r_avg > (current_y_avg + current_b_avg);

input: What is the total consumption for the Main meter at CNS on the last day of every month?
query: SELECT time::date, SUM(consumption) FROM main_cns WHERE time = (DATE_TRUNC('month', time) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day')::date GROUP BY time::date;

input: Identify the day of the week with the highest average energy consumption at Glide Path.
query: SELECT EXTRACT(DOW from time) AS day_of_week, AVG(consumption) AS avg_consumption FROM main_glide GROUP BY EXTRACT(DOW from time) ORDER BY avg_consumption DESC LIMIT 1;

input: Calculate the total kWh of UPS1 at Glide Path for the monsoon season 2023.
query: SELECT SUM(consumption) FROM ups1_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) >= 6 AND EXTRACT(month from time) <= 9 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;

input: Find the maximum true power for the Y-phase of the AC meter at Localizer.
query: SELECT MAX(true_power_y_max) FROM ac_local;

input: Find the average true power for the R-phase at CNS during hours where the power factor was below 0.85.
query: SELECT AVG(true_power_r_avg) FROM main_cns WHERE pf_r_avg < 0.85;

input: List the dates where the total energy used at the site was less than the energy used by the AC meter alone (Data Anomaly Check).
query: SELECT m.time::date FROM main_cns m JOIN ac_cns a ON m.time = a.time WHERE m.consumption < a.consumption;

input: Identify the dates in 2023 when the R-phase voltage at the Localizer was consistently above 245V for the entire day.
query: SELECT time::date FROM main_local WHERE voltage_r_avg > 245 AND EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023 GROUP BY time::date HAVING COUNT(*) = 24;

input: Calculate the average total apparent power for the UPS2 meter at Glide Path during the Winter season.
query: SELECT AVG(apparent_power_total_avg) FROM ups2_glide WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) IN (10, 11, 12, 1);

input: Show the maximum frequency fluctuation at DVOR today.
query: SELECT MAX(freq_max - freq_min) FROM main_dvor WHERE time::date = CURRENT_DATE;

input: List the minimum line-to-line voltage YB for UPS2 at Localizer in June.
query: SELECT MIN(voltage_yb_min) FROM ups2_local WHERE EXTRACT(month from time) = 6;

input: Identify any dates where the average voltage at Localizer was below 220V for more than 12 hours.
query: SELECT time::date FROM main_local WHERE voltage_avg_avg < 220 GROUP BY time::date HAVING COUNT(*) > 12;

input: Show the records for Main meter at CNS where power factor is below 0.8.
query: SELECT * FROM main_cns WHERE pf_avg_avg < 0.8 LIMIT 100;

input: Find the maximum total true power recorded for the Main meter at CNS in 2023.
query: SELECT MAX(true_power_total_max) FROM main_cns WHERE EXTRACT(year from time) = 2023;
